assertions.description: INCORRECT: statistics.component_types shows 'transformer': 2 for components T0 and T1, but both have lib_id='archive:Mechanical_MountingHole_Pad' and value='MountingHole_Pad'. The 'T' prefix is being interpreted as transformer when these are clearly padded mounting holes. The 5 correctly-classified mounting holes (MP1, MP2, MP3, VM1, IM1) use the same lib_id but have 'M'-prefix or 'V'/'I'-prefix refs. The component type classifier is using reference prefix 'T' → transformer heuristic which collides with non-standard pad mounting hole designators.

The design has Y1 (TSX-3225 16MHz crystal, lib_id='archive:Device_Crystal_GND24_Small', type=crystal) connected to the STM32F103C8Tx MCU (U2). Despite the type field being correctly set to 'crystal' and the crystal being present, signal_analysis.crystal_circuits=[] — no crystal circuit was extracted. This is likely a failure to match the GND24_Small footprint variant or the archive-prefixed lib_id against the detector's crystal template patterns.
